system.description:
Prerequisites: Willpower 45

Focus Power: Challenging (+0) Opposed Willpower Test

Subtype: Concentration

The psyker reaches into the target's body and mind, warping and weakening one of his characteristics. This insidious curse can cripple even the mightiest warrior, leaving him a shadow of his former self.

The psyker must nominate a single target within range and line of sight, who may resist with an Opposed Willpower Test. If the psyker wins the test, the target suffers 1d5 points of damage to a characteristic of the psyker's choice.
